title: Cyclophorus serpens
intro: Cyclophorus serpens, also known as the snake vine or serpent vine, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The health benefits of Cyclophorus serpens include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Cyclophorus serpens is commonly prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is used to make herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and ointments.
